cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Eve ends up after all those position swaps. I need to track each swap step by step. Let me start by writing down the initial positions. The original assignments are: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Now, there are five swaps in total. Let's go through each one carefully. First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So after this swap: - Dave is now goalkeeper (since Eve was there) - Eve is now left winger (since Dave was there) The rest (Alice, Bob, Claire) remain in their original positions. Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. So now: - Claire becomes center midfielder (Bob's original position) - Bob becomes right midfielder (Claire's original position) Others remain as they were after the first swap. Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions.
